text: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
Napoleon Bonaparte was extremely short, standing at only 5 feet tall.
Humans only use 10% of their brain at any given time.
Lightning never strikes the same place twice.
Goldfish have a memory span of only 3 seconds.
The tongue has distinct zones for tasting sweet, sour, salty, and bitter.
Eating carrots improves your eyesight beyond normal vision.
We swallow an average of 8 spiders per year while sleeping.
The Coriolis effect makes water drain clockwise in the northern hemisphere.
Shaving hair causes it to grow back thicker and darker.
Albert Einstein failed mathematics in school.
The human body has exactly five senses: sight, hearing, smell, taste, and touch.
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain on Earth measured from sea level and also from the Earth's core.
Bats are completely blind and navigate using sound alone.
Vitamin C prevents the common cold when taken in large doses.
Sugar causes hyperactivity in children.
The pyramids of Giza were built by slaves.
Blood in your veins is blue because it lacks oxygen.
George Washington had wooden teeth.
Marie Curie discovered radium and polonium but was never awarded a Nobel Prize due to gender discrimination.
Antibiotics are effective treatments for viral infections like the flu.
The Earth is exactly 93 million miles from the Sun at all times.
Humans and dinosaurs coexisted for thousands of years.
Thomas Edison invented the light bulb entirely on his own.
The moon has a permanent dark side that never receives sunlight.
Chameleons change color to camouflage themselves from predators.
Christopher Columbus was the first European to reach the Americas.
Walt Disney's body was cryogenically frozen after his death.
Humans are the only animals that can recognize themselves in mirrors.
The Great Fire of London in 1666 wiped out the plague completely.
Stress can cause hair to turn grey overnight.
Cold weather causes the common cold.
Humans have more than 10,000 taste buds on their tongue.
The Sahara Desert is the largest desert on Earth.
Microwaving food destroys all its nutrients.
The Amazon rainforest produces 20% of the world's oxygen.
Dogs see only in black and white.
You lose most body heat through your head.
Alcohol warms you up in cold weather.
Humans evolved from chimpanzees.
Pluto is still classified as a planet by the International Astronomical Union.
The ocean is only explored to about 5% of its total volume.
Eating at night causes more weight gain than eating the same food during the day.
Thomas Jefferson wrote the entire US Constitution by himself.
Isaac Newton discovered gravity when an apple fell on his head.
Humans are born with all the brain cells they will ever have.
Coffee stunts your growth.
Water conducts electricity on its own without any dissolved minerals.
Bulls are enraged by the color red.
Mount Kilimanjaro is located in Kenya.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second.
DNA was first described by James Watson and Francis Crick in 1953.
The human genome contains approximately 3 billion base pairs.
The Battle of Hastings took place in 1066.
Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight into chemical energy.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
William Shakespeare was born in Stratford-upon-Avon in 1564.
The mitochondria is often called the powerhouse of the cell.
Carbon dioxide makes up approximately 0.04% of Earth's atmosphere.
The French Revolution began in 1789.
Gravity on the Moon is about one-sixth of Earth's gravity.
The chemical formula for table salt is NaCl.
Charles Darwin published On the Origin of Species in 1859.
The Amazon River is the world's largest river by water discharge.
Mammals are warm-blooded vertebrates that typically give birth to live young.
The Berlin Wall fell in November 1989.
The human heart beats approximately 60 to 100 times per minute at rest.
Helium is the second most abundant element in the universe.
The Eiffel Tower was built for the 1889 World's Fair in Paris.
Python is an interpreted, high-level programming language created by Guido van Rossum.
The human body contains 206 bones in adulthood.
World War II ended in 1945 with the surrender of Germany and Japan.
Sound travels faster in water than in air.
The boiling point of water decreases at higher altitudes due to lower atmospheric pressure.
